title: Tom Yum Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and sour Thai noodle soup made with a flavorful broth and a variety of ingredients.

ingredients.name: Rigatoni
ingredients.notes: any shape of pasta will do

instructions: Cook the rigatoni according to the package instructions.
In a large pot, combine the chicken or vegetable broth, fish sauce, toasted rice vinegar, and port wine vinegar.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Add the cooked rigatoni to the pot and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: add protein like chicken or shrimp for added flavor.
